recommendations.title: Last Shift
recommendations.overview: Rookie police officer Jessica Loren has been assigned the last shift at a closing police station and must wait for a hazmat crew to collect biomedical evidence. Ordered not to leave the station under any circumstances, Jessica comes to learn that it'

recommendations.title: Dread
recommendations.overview: Three college students set out to document what other people dread the most. However, one of the three turns out to secretly be a sadistic psychopath who uses this knowledge to gruesomely torture the subjects.

recommendations.title: Most Likely to Die
recommendations.overview: A group of former classmates gather for a pre-party at one of their homes the night before their 10-year high school reunion, and one by one, they are brutally slain in a manner befitting each's senior yearbook superlative.

recommendations.title: The Guilty
recommendations.overview: Police officer Asger Holm, demoted to desk work as an alarm dispatcher, answers a call from a panicked woman who claims to have been kidnapped. Confined to the police station and with the phone as his only tool, Asger races against time to get help a

recommendations.title: Frequency
recommendations.overview: When a rare phenomenon gives police officer John Sullivan the chance to speak to his father, 30 years in the past, he takes the opportunity to prevent his dad's tragic death.  After his actions inadvertently give rise to a series of brutal murders he

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Popcorn
recommendations.overview: While holding a horror film festival, a group of film students find themselves stalked by a madman who may have a sinister connection to a cult leader.

recommendations.title: Messiah of Evil
recommendations.overview: A young woman searching for her missing artist father finds herself in the strange seaside town of Point Dune, which seems to be under the influence of a mysterious undead cult.

recommendations.title: Frenzy
recommendations.overview: London is terrorized by a vicious sex killer known as The Necktie Murderer. Following the brutal slaying of his ex-wife, down-on-his-luck Richard Blaney is suspected by the police of being the killer. He goes on the run, determined to prove his innoc
